title: euodia ruticarpa var. bodinieri
intro: Euodia ruticarpa var. bodinieri, also known as Euodia, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to China and used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to warm the body and dispel cold, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Euodia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Euodia is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make capsules or tinctures.
